producer: demiurge RTSC N5 funnel — RbTlH3 DFT el-ph (QE 7.5 conda) on pool:ubu-1 (parallel to vast SrAuH3, g55). parse_elph_gen.py BZ-weighted.
purpose: N5 funnel (§9.10) ambient-stable hydride 탐색 후보. M8 게이트(<50GPa AND stable AND Tc>200K) 평가 대상.
system: RbTlH3 cubic Pm-3m perovskite (1 Rb + 1 Tl + 3 H = 5 atoms), ibrav=1, celldm=8.504 bohr. Rb(0.5,0.5,0.5) / Tl(0,0,0) / H at 3d sites. PBE rrkjus PAW.

method.code: Quantum ESPRESSO 7.5 (conda, miniforge) pw.x + ph.x electron_phonon='simple'
method.scf: ecutwfc=80 Ry, ecutrho=640 Ry, 12x12x12 k-grid, MP smearing
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT 4x4x4 q (10 irreducible, weights [5,10,10,15,15,11,10,15,11,6]=108), electron_phonon='simple'
method.host: pool:ubu-1 (parallel offload from ubu-2 chain, g55 wall-time)

stability.note: 10 imaginary modes (worst -644.8 cm-1) across the 4x4x4 q-grid → structure dynamically unstable at this geometry. Tc values are unstable-mode-drop upper-bounds (convention), structural reliability low — same caveat class as h3o/h3si (RTSC.md §10.1).

Tc_verify.verbatim: verify --expr allen_dynes_tc(2.818,210.6,0.1)=36.8326 · calc=36.8326 ≈ expected (|Δ|=1.39977e-11 ≤ ε=1e-9) · 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL (hexa-native libm-class, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

m8_verdict.Tc_axis: FAIL — Tc(mu0.10)=32-37K ≪ 200K target. Strong coupling (lambda=2.39-2.82) but heavy Tl → soft phonons (omega_log~205K) caps Tc (Tc∝omega_log).
m8_verdict.stability_axis: FAIL — dynamically unstable (10 imaginary modes, min -645 cm-1).
m8_verdict.pressure_axis: not computed (EOS not run) — moot given Tc+stability fails.
m8_verdict.framing: RbTlH3 = N5 funnel negative result (per @D d2: scientific finding, not impossibility). Heavy-cation perovskite hydride: high lambda undercut by low omega_log + instability. Narrows ambient-superhydride search away from heavy-cation perovskites.

r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1+2 preserved. M8 FAIL framed as funnel finding (d2), not impossibility.

provenance.n5_parallel: launched on freed ubu-1 after RbTlH3... (self), parallel to SrAuH3(vast)+chain — g55
